topic.title: MPORTANT: INFO 7375 Central Hub & Practical AI Branding Resource
topic.text:
MPORTANT: INFO 7375 Central Hub & Practical AI Branding Resource

Hello Class,

As we dive into INFO 7375: Branding and AI, our focus is on moving beyond theory into AI literacy through practice. To support your work on the Madison framework and your Personal Brand & Portfolio (which accounts for 50% of your total grade), I will be centralizing all supplemental guidance, AI tutorials, and career strategy advice at:

👉 https://nikbearbrown.substack.com/

How this supports your success in INFO 7375:

  • Module 6–9 Support: Many upcoming articles will focus specifically on branding, AI storytelling, and finding a job. This is designed to help you build the "career-ready portfolio" required for your final project.

  • Technical Tutorials: Beyond our Canvas and GitHub materials, I will post practical AI tutorials to help you develop the storytelling assets and visuals needed for your personal brand identity.

  • The Madison Framework: I will share insights on the agent-based architecture of the Madison framework and its five layers to help you ideate your required framework extension.

Your Instructions:

  1. Subscribe immediately: This is the easiest way for me to share daily insights on the asymmetry of AI-generated bullshit and how to effectively use AI to build a portfolio that actually distinguishes you in a competitive market.

  2. Engage with the content: I expect you to interact with the tutorials and job advice, especially as they relate to your Module 10 Startup Strategy and your final portfolio assembly.

  3. Check Settings: You can set your subscription to "digest" mode, but you are responsible for the information shared there as it directly complements our course modules.

As I mention in our syllabus, "a transcript does not equal judgment." This hub is where we build that judgment together.

See you in class and in the comments.

Best,

Professor Nik Bear Brown, PhD, MBA Associate Teaching Professor, Northeastern University
